svg.font-family: 'SF Pro Display', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: SiteSafe Admin Panel — Low Level Design (LLD) Diagram
Enterprise MDM Middleware — Samsung MDM Camera Blocking App
JWT Auth - RBAC - Rate Limiting - Audit Logging
REST API - Helmet - CORS - Winston Logging
2. Application Request Flow — Layered Middleware Architecture
Joi Schemas - AdminValidator - MobileValidator - ADEValidator - Input sanitization
Services — Business Logic Layer (20 service modules)
Sequelize Models (16) - PostgreSQL Queries - Connection Pool - Migrations - Seeders
NanoMDMService (HTTP Client) - FirebaseService (FCM Push) - Profile Builders (XML/Plist/Signing)
Error Handler (AppError hierarchy) - Winston Logger - Scheduler (SyncScheduler) - RBAC - Rate Limiting
3. iOS ADE Enrollment Flow — Apple Business Manager - NanoDEP - Middleware - NanoMDM
4. Camera Block/Unblock Flow + Mobile App Registration + OTP Uninstall
Registers with: device_identifier - device_os (android/ios) - device_name - employee_id - push_token - notification_platform (fcm/apns)
DB: one_time_passwords (is_used, expires_at, attempt_count max=3) - 5 min TTL - 8-digit code
Both Android and iOS devices use the same OTP flow via MobileService
5. Database ERD + Auth Flow + MDM Command Flow + Scheduler
HS256 - Access 15m - Refresh 7d - Payload: {id, username, email, role}
Health Check: NanoMDM GET /version + DB connectivity
MDM Proxy: /mdm/* - Unwrap PKCS#7 - Forward - Sign
6. API Route Map — Complete Endpoint Inventory
POST /api/v1/auth/admin/login JWT no auth admin login
POST /api/v1/auth/login JWT no auth user login
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh JWT no auth token refresh
SiteSafe Admin Panel — Low Level Design Diagram v2.0 — Samsung MDM Camera Blocking App — July 2026
